mapper.select:
SELECT id, static_equip_name, static_equip_tag, static_equip_loc, static_equip_op_temp, static_equip_op_press, static_equip_med, static_equip_factory_no, static_equip_category, static_equip_weght, static_equip_inspest_date, static_equip_next_inspest_date, status, dv_code FROM static_equip
AND static_equip_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.staticEquipName}, '%')
AND static_equip_tag LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.staticEquipTag}, '%')
AND status = #{queryParams.status}
AND dv_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.dvCode}, '%')
